message.content: =You are a research assistant for fiction writing.

=Research for a {{ $('get_genre_config').first().json[0]?.genre_name || $('get_genre_config').first().json.genre_name || 'fiction' }} novel about: {{ $('workflow_trigger').item.json.initial_concept }}. Themes: {{ $('workflow_trigger').item.json.themes }}. Provide historical details, scientific accuracy, cultural context, real-world parallels, and inspiration sources.

parameters.subject: =Book Outline: {{ $json.title }}

assignments.name: result
assignments.value: =Book outline created for "{{ $json.title }}" with {{ ($json.outline?.chapters || []).length }} chapters and {{ ($json.outline?.characters || []).length }} characters. Emailed and saved to writing projects.
